ab: Kui, marimura ku ku sapacapacasane, lri maka pakisaalruanana su nakuane?
ch: W:Kui，我忘了帶筆，你可以借我嗎?
en: Kui, I forgot to bring my pen. Can you lend me one?

ab: Kadrua ku nakuane, kikay Pidhuanane.
en: I don’t have one either. This is Paduay’s.

ab: Lai pakisaalru su nakuane padalruana? Lri padalruaku si saulri musuane.
ch: W:那可以借我一下子嗎?我很快就還你。
en: Can you lend me the pen for a second? I will return to you immediately.

ab: Unu, ani malra.
en: Sure, take it.

ab: Inilringa, maelanenga iyanga ki Pidhuay.
en: Thank you and thank Pidhuay for me.

ab: Manemane ku aparalubane li?
en: May I help you?

ab: Lri saulria ku kay drusa kay hungu.
en: I want to return these two books.

ab: Iya, yakayyana ku druma?
en: No problem and what else do you need?

ab: Lri kisaalruana naku ku tulru ku hungu.
en: I would like to borrow these three books.

ab: Mathariringa. tarangulringava si kela saulri lumakatulrulunga.
ch: A:好了。記得三天後要拿來還。
en: Sure and remember to return them after three days.

ab: Kai su wasaulriana ku sasupisupilrane li.
en: You haven’t returned me the eraser.

ab: Wasaulringa naku kuiya.
en: I returned it yesterday.

ab: Ku sasupisupilrane li anikaulraunga.
ch: M:那我的橡皮擦怎麼不見了。
en: Then, why is my eraser missing?

ab: Kaisu ka pakisaalru ki Kalravuane.
en: Did you lend it to Kalravuane?

ab: Kai naku wathingale. Lu kivaga ki alisu.
en: I don’t know. I will go and ask her.

ab: Kiasaalruana kay sasupisupilrane li.
en: I will lend you my eraser first.

ab: Pangudrale, kikay sapakabelengane pakisaalru musane ki Karuku?
en: Pangudrale, did Karuku lend you this coat?

ab: Ini, kikay langay ki ina si baai nakuane.
ch: W:不是，這是我媽媽買給我的。
en: No, my mom bought it for me.

ab: Ka sapakabelengane ki Karuku maramaw ki musuane.
en: Karuku’s coat is the same as yours.

ab: Ka sapakabelengane ki lasu iceecelrenge, makaela ku kulaw nay.
ch: W:他的外套是黑色的，我們的顏色不一樣。
en: His coat is black, so our colors are different.

ab: Pelelresane, kiasaalru su ki Kulele ku paysu?
en: Pelelresane, did you borrow money from Kulele?

ab: Unu, nayka wasaulria ku iniane kaykameane, kainaku siapaysu.
ch: W:有，我本來今天要還他，我忘記帶錢了。
en: Yes, I was supposed to return to him today, but I forgot to bring the money.

ab: Lalri saulri su luigane?
en: Then, when will you return the money?

ab: Naw saulringa iniane luiya.
en: I will return to him tomorrow.

ab: Iya, naw iyanga ki Kulele.
en: Okay, I will tell Kulele for you.
